name: m2_failts_then_pass
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : ts) over window:time(150ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): a fire boundary between the fail-write and the pass-write makes the intermediate state REAL: epoch 1 evaluates tag=z (nothing), epoch 2's {tag} write is a mask-miss. No revival — contrast m3.
